title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono, Founding Mathematician at Axiom Math, argues that humans should not compete with AI on knowledge accumulation, as they will lose that race. Instead, he contends that curiosity, human judgment, and creativity remain the core of intelligence in the age of AI, drawing on the example of Ramanujan to illustrate how institutional systems can miss unconventional genius.
